violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Sliced deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The deli display case located in the deli area was not in good repair. Duct tape was observed on areas of damage. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The areas behind equipment and in the basement have an accumulation of pest droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all areas where rodent droppings are present. Establishments is to continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by bowls and utensils. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the butcher area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Food was observed for sale from owners private residence, food items must come from an approved source. Food items 2 tres leches were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front and side, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets in the back meat case observed in poor repair. Gasket shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
